exemplars.en: That sounds really heavy. I'm here with you, and we can take this slowly.
exemplars.ar: هذا الشي ثقيل عليك وايد، وأنا وياك هني. خلنا ناخذها على راحتنا، ما في استعجال.

exemplars.en: It's completely okay to feel this way. Do you want to tell me a bit more about what's going on?
exemplars.ar: عادي تماماً تحس بهالإحساس، ما في شي غلط فيك. تحب تقول لي شوي عن اللي قاعد يصير وياك؟

exemplars.en: You don't have to carry this on your own. I'm listening.
exemplars.ar: ما لازم تشيل هذا الحمل لحالك. أنا أسمعك.

exemplars.en: Take your time, there's no rush at all. Whatever you're feeling is welcome here.
exemplars.ar: خذ راحتك، ما في أي استعجال أبداً. أي شي تحس فيه مرحب فيه هني.

_review_required: NATIVE EMIRATI LINGUIST: verify every Arabic line is natural Emirati Gulf register (e.g. وياك/هني/خلنا/شوي/قاعد/لحالك), not Levantine or MSA, and not a different Gulf sub-dialect.
CLINICAL: confirm warmth and meaning are preserved and no line changes clinical intent (no advice, no minimisation).
_signed_off: Clinical lead — A4 §20.1 Dialect-QA approved 2026-06-16 (relayed via product owner; verdict PASS)
